reviews.comment: Large, popular and expensive campsite north of San Martin. But it is clean, well kept and reasonably quiet despite being next to a main road. 10 minute walk to the centre.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRenJtem5BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Sorprendente!,  uno de los pocos responsables de un lugar que amablemente responde y saluda los comentarios, Genial!, ojalá muchos propietarios sigan el ejemplo.

(Translated by Google)
Amazing! One of the few owners of a place who kindly responds to and acknowledges comments. Great! I hope many owners follow his example.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de tanto los playeros como en el shop. Tiene para inflar las ruedas de forma automática muy fácil, cómoda y gratuitamente.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from both the beach attendants and the shop staff. They have an automatic tire inflator that's very easy, convenient, and free.
